requiredReportItems.requirement: Report whether each candidate check was attempted, skipped, or unavailable.
Report captured command output artifact paths or explicitly state that runtime command Evidence is missing.
requiredReportItems.requiredWhen: candidate runtime check is attempted or expected

requiredReportItems.requirement: Report whether runtime Evidence is present, missing, or non-authoritative for the add-todo behavior proof.
Report whether the available Evidence satisfies runtime Evidence authority requirements.
requiredReportItems.requiredWhen: runtime Evidence is present or claimed

requiredReportItems.requirement: Report whether production source files were modified during the proof attempt.
Report whether the source-edit stop condition was triggered because runtime proof appeared to need production source changes.
Report that the fixture remains calibration-only, not approved, not supported, and not user acceptance.

requiredEvidenceReferences.reportRequirement: Reference captured runtime command output or state that authoritative runtime Evidence is missing.
Describe the attached structure-only Evidence boundary if it is mentioned.
Reference a future source non-modification report or state that no authoritative report exists.

requiredCommandOutputReferences.requiredReport: Captured output artifact with command, exit status, pass/fail status, assertion summary, linked check, linked acceptance criteria, and source non-modification statement; otherwise explicit missing Evidence status.
Report that attached Evidence is structure-only context and does not satisfy runtime Evidence authority by itself.

requiredCommandOutputReferences.candidateCommand: future compliance checker or diff review
requiredCommandOutputReferences.requiredReport: Report production source modification status or explicitly state that source non-modification Evidence is missing.

requiredSourceModificationStatement.mustReport: whether production source files such as src/todos.ts were modified

requiredStopConditionStatement.mustReport: whether source-edit stop condition was triggered
requiredStopConditionStatement.ifTriggered: stop and report that production source edits appear necessary; do not silently expand scope

missingOutputEvidence.reason: No captured runtime command output exists for this calibration fixture.
No compliance-checker or diff report exists for production source non-modification.
No runtime Evidence exists to evaluate against the authority requirements.

allowedUse: review what a test-only proof report should include
distinguish report text from authoritative runtime Evidence
preserve the production source non-modification reporting boundary
nonExecutionBoundary: This preview defines report obligations for calibration review only. It does not run checks, capture passing Evidence, satisfy runtime Evidence authority, create required checks, enforce CI, modify source, generate a contract candidate, approve promotion, or replace user acceptance.
